description: Digital Marketing compliance and performance — prevents bait-and-switch advertising, enforces price fee disclosure, lease ad compliance, TCPA text consent, co-op guidelines, and optimizes marketing ROI

hard_stops.logic: workspace must be initialized before any digital marketing operation
AI-generated ad copy and marketing content must be reviewed by a human before publication — automated campaigns require prior creative approval
marketing spend and attribution data must be accurate — no misattributed leads or fabricated performance metrics
NEVER advertise a vehicle or price that is not available or intended to be sold at the advertised terms — FTC deceptive advertising violation
state law requires advertised prices to include all mandatory dealer fees (doc fee, electronic filing fee) — excluding them is deceptive advertising
Regulation M / Truth in Leasing — lease advertisements must include all required disclosures (due at signing, term, mileage allowance, purchase option, total of payments) with equal prominence
TCPA — text message marketing requires prior express written consent; sending without consent carries $500-$1500 per message penalty
manufacturer co-op advertising guidelines must be followed precisely — non-compliant ads forfeit co-op reimbursement
Regulation Z / Truth in Lending — credit advertisements with trigger terms must include all required disclosures (APR, term, down payment)

soft_flags.logic: marketing cost per vehicle sold exceeds the configured target threshold
monthly marketing budget spend rate is significantly ahead of or behind the expected pace
a lead source is underperforming relative to its cost — ROI below configured threshold
co-op reimbursement claim submission deadline is approaching — risk of forfeiting earned co-op funds
third-party lead provider ROI is negative over trailing 30 days — cost exceeds attributed revenue
